title: Crime Data Analysis Dashboard Los Angeles
author: @Rotich12
description: Data analytics dashboard leveraging Dash, Plotly, Folium and Pandas to explore temporal and spatial crime patterns with interactive filtering and visualization.

title: Los Angeles Crime Data Dashboard
author: @youssefmoustafa456-wq
description: This project provides an interactive dashboard for analyzing crime data in Los Angeles. The dashboard allows users to explore crime trends, types of crimes, and demographic insights. Built using Excel (with slicers and charts) for clear visualization and easy interaction.

title: los Angeles project
author: @NadaHussein27
description: This repository explores crime data in Los Angeles, focusing on data cleaning, transformation, and visualization. It provides insights into crime trends, patterns by location and time, and potential factors influencing crime rates. The project demonstrates SQL for data wrangling and Excel for interactive dashboards and analysis.

title: los angeles crime data analytics
author: @N0AH-14
description: This repository hosts a comprehensive analytics pipeline for processing and analyzing Los Angeles Crime Data (2020–Present). It covers extraction, cleaning, ETL, basic machine learning, and visualization, with outputs integrated into PowerBI for interactive dashboards.

title: CodeAlpha DataVisualization
author: @dipanjan-18
description: Interactive Power BI dashboard for visualizing Los Angeles Crime Data (2020–Present), highlighting crime trends, demographics, hotspots, and key insights.

title: Crime Analysis
author: @Laurlyna
description: SQL & Excel analysis of 1M+ rows of Los Angeles crime data (2020-2025) with interactive dashboard visualization

title: Crime Analytics Dashboard
author: @Gaurav-Bhatnagar-29
description: A Power BI-based analytics dashboard that transforms Los Angeles crime data into interactive visualizations for trend analysis, hotspot detection, and decision support.

title: crime analytics powerbi
author: @Yuangp01
description: Los Angeles Crime Analytics Dashboard is an end-to-end data visualization and analytics project built with Power BI. It provides an interactive interface for exploring Los Angeles crime trends using Power Query, DAX, data modeling, and dynamic dashboards to support data-driven decision-making.

title: vmla fixla app
author: @evanvmla
description: Fix LA — civic issue reporting app for Los Angeles
